name: DLM School Bus
registry_source: D&B / business directory (Illinois SOS search UI is JS-gated; not directly verifiable via WebFetch)
notes: Legal entity is 'DLM School Bus Line, Inc.' at 3011 E End Ave / also referenced at 1901 E End Ave / 137 E 17th St, Chicago Heights, IL 60411. Phones 708-755-1100 / 708-755-1525. D&B reports founded 1999, ~50 employees, ~$2.1M revenue. No matching record returned in SAFER for 'DLM School Bus' or 'DLM' name search (only DLM Logistics IN, DLM Transportation LLC, DLM Transportation Inc, none at Chicago Heights). Likely operates intrastate-only and is therefore not in the federal SAFER passenger carrier database, or operates under an unrelated parent USDOT. Yelp shows business may be CLOSED as of recent listings — operating status unverified.

name: North American Central Sch Bus
fmcsa_address: 3033 W Jefferson St Suite 220, Joliet, IL 60435
inc_date: 2004 (NACSB founded; Illinois Central School Bus LLC USDOT registered Dec 2007)
officers: unknown - LLC managed by Illinois Central School Bus LLC / NACSB management team
entity_status: Active (registered to Illinois Central School Bus per Idaho SOS reporting)
registry_source: Idaho Secretary of State (per Idaho Education News reporting); FMCSA SAFER carrier snapshot
notes: Nampa, ID location at 12020 Karcher Rd operates locally as Brown Bus Company, a division of NACSB / Illinois Central School Bus LLC (USDOT 1714924, MC-629008). DBA on SAFER listed as 'Kansas Central School Bus' but carrier is the umbrella Illinois Central School Bus LLC covering NACSB operations in IL, IN, WI, MO, KS, PA, ID, IA, TX and Ontario; ~6,000 buses across all NACSB locations. Nampa School District terminated contract for 2024-25; service may have shifted to First Student. Local USDOT 691683 (Brown Bus Co Inc) is INACTIVE in SAFER. Owned by H.I.G. Capital.

name: Witzel Bus Svc Inc
fmcsa_address: 203 Highway 59 North, Fulda, MN 56131 (mailing: PO Box 383, Fulda, MN 56131)
inc_date: 1999 (per D&B; MN SOS file not directly retrievable via WebFetch)
entity_status: unknown (likely inactive given USDOT inactive and very low recent reported mileage)
registry_source: D&B / FMCSA SAFER; Minnesota SOS portal requires interactive JS lookup
notes: USDOT 945781 matches Witzel Bus Service in Fulda, MN; SAFER shows record INACTIVE. Last MCS-150 reported 160 miles for 2012 - consistent with very small operator that wound down or moved to intrastate-only. 8 power units, 13 drivers per last filing. Classified as school bus (16+ passengers) Private Passenger Business carrier. Address verified to Fulda location.

name: Black Hawk Community Bus Inc
registry_source: Mississippi Secretary of State (Entity ID 105680) via city-data.com mirror
notes: MS SOS Entity ID 105680, Non-Profit Corporation, registered 1970-09-24, status Good Standing. Registered agent address: Route 2, Black Hawk, MS. No matching record in FMCSA SAFER for 'Black Hawk Community Bus' - this is a very small, very old community-run non-profit bus service in rural Carroll County, MS. Coila, MS is the listed HQ on the source list; the SOS lists incorporators at Black Hawk, MS / Lexington, MS. Likely intrastate-only operation, hence absent from FMCSA SAFER federal database.

name: JG Us Inc Which Will Do Bus
entity_status: Active foreign corp (per CA Statement & Designation filed 2016-05-31); SC entity status unverified
registry_source: California SOS (Statement & Designation By Foreign Corporation, 2016-05-31); SC SOS portal requires JS
notes: CRITICAL MISCLASSIFICATION: 'JG US Inc Which Will Do Bus[iness] As JustGiving CA Inc' is the US arm of JustGiving, an online charitable fundraising platform acquired by Blackbaud in 2017. 'Which Will Do Bus' in the source list was truncated from 'Which Will Do Business As'. Address 65 Fairchild St, Daniel Island, SC 29492 is Blackbaud's HQ campus. This is NOT a school bus / student transportation operator and should be removed from the tuck-in target universe. No USDOT registration applicable.
